title: NeuroPC Answer Log Row
description: One governed, non-actuating answer emitted via neuro.print! or other NPFs.

body.description: Rendered text body of the answer.

domain.description: Domain tag, e.g., BCI, Biomech, HIT, MCI, Legal.

roh.description: Local AnswerRisk RoH estimate, clamped at 0.3.

cybostate.description: Cybostate class assigned by the answer-quality kernel.

rest_advisory.description: True if BioState envelopes recommend rest / reduced load.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the answer was created.

hexstamp.description: Hash over body + metadata for tamper-evidence.

prev_hexstamp.description: Hexstamp of previous answer in this log, or 'GENESIS'.
